title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Wadhwa Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
